title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight Mixture-of-Experts model designed for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. The model activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token and was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than traditional GPU setups.
writeup: The video tests Meituan's LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight Mixture-of-Experts model aimed at long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. It activates roughly 48 billion parameters per token, keeping inference sparse despite the large total size. Notably, the model was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than conventional GPU clusters, a detail relevant to discussions of training hardware alternatives. The coverage situates it among recent large open-weight releases from China.
